title: 현대자동차, 완전자율주행차 모델 3종 출시
summary: 현대자동차가 레벨 4 완전자율주행 기능을 갖춘 신차 모델 3종을 출시했습니다.
content: Hyundai Motor Company launched three new Level 4 autonomous vehicle models. These vehicles can operate without human intervention on highways. Urban driving capability is planned for next year's update. Safety testing exceeded all regulatory requirements. The launch positions Hyundai among global EV market leaders. Consumer interest has been overwhelmingly positive. Production capacity will be doubled by year-end. Insurance companies are developing new coverage plans. Government approval for widespread use is pending. Test drive programs are opening in major cities.
